title: lepidium latifolium subsp. obtusum
intro: Lepidium latifolium subsp. obtusum, also known as Garden Cress or Broad-leaved Cress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of Lepidium latifolium subsp. obtusum include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
